    Method
    Description
    int
    VoteMilestonesManager.forceGroup(VotingPluginUser user, String groupId, boolean bypassLimits, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeData)

    Long
    VoteMilestonesManager.getLastMilestoneValue(String groupId, VotingPluginUser user)
    Returns the last (most recent) VoteMilestone trigger value for the given group (or default), based on enabled milestones in that group.
    Long
    VoteMilestonesManager.getNextMilestoneValue(String groupId, VotingPluginUser user)
    Returns the next VoteMilestone trigger value for the given group (or default), based on enabled milestones in that group.
    abstract long
    VoteMilestoneTotal.getValue(VotingPluginUser user, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeMessageData)
     
    long
    VoteMilestonesManager.getVotesUntilNextMilestone(String groupId, VotingPluginUser user)
    Returns how many votes (in the same counter used by the next milestone) until the next milestone.
    void
    VoteMilestonesManager.handleVote(VotingPluginUser user, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeMessageData, boolean forceBungee, UUID voteUUID, Map<String,String> contextPlaceholders)

    VoteMilestonesManager.handleVote(VotingPluginUser user, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeMessageData, Map<String,String> contextPlaceholders)

    VoteMilestonesManager.previewGroup(VotingPluginUser user, String groupId, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeData)

    VoteMilestonesManager.resetLimits(VotingPluginUser user, String groupId)

    VoteMilestonesManager.status(VotingPluginUser user, String groupId, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeData)
    Backwards-compatible one-line status (keeps existing callers).
    List<String>
    VoteMilestonesManager.statusGroup(VotingPluginUser user, String groupId, VoteTotalsSnapshot bungeeData)
    Detailed status for a group: shows what has already been given (based on limiter storage) and what should have been given given the current total.
